question: What do you notice about the leaves in the image? Select from the following options: (A) They are all green. (B) They are all yellow. (C) They are all brown and falling off the trees. (D) They are a mixture of green and yellow.
gold_answer: They are a mixture of green and yellow
answer_choices: They are all brown and falling off the trees
They are a mixture of green and yellow

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A dense patch of bright green leaves with no yellow or brown.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Yellow leaves, brown leaves, mixed colors, autumn foliage.

inpaint_prompt_used: A dense patch of bright green leaves with no yellow or brown.
